# Acme Corp

Acme Corporation is a mid-size technology company based in Toronto. The company specializes in enterprise SaaS products and data analytics.

James Liu serves as VP of Engineering. Brian Anderson sits on the advisory board. Acme Corp partners with CFO Centre Canada for fractional CFO services.

Current projects include the Digital Transformation initiative and Project Atlas. Acme's tech stack is built on Python, PostgreSQL, and Redis.

The company has 250 employees and was founded in 2015.
